0122212112002010001111022021020010110000222 - ASI: 28

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  12 = 1 * 2
  22 = 2 * 2
  002 = 0 * 02
  011 = 01 * 1
  102 = 1 * 02
  112 = 1 * 12
  202 = 2 * 02
  222 = 2 * 22
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0111 = 011 * 1
  1011 = 1 * 011
  00222 = 00 * 222
  01222 = 01 * 222
  10200 = 102 * 00
  12112 = 12 * 112
  101100 = 1011 * 00
  102202 = 102 * 202
  0020100 = 002 * 0100
  0122212112 = 01222 * 12112
  00201000111 = 0020100 * 0111
  10110000222 = 101100 * 00222
  10220210200 = 102202 * 10200
  012221211200201000111 = 0122212112 * 00201000111
  1022021020010110000222 = 10220210200 * 10110000222
  0122212112002010001111022021020010110000222 = 012221211200201000111 * 1022021020010110000222
